dives_framework.description: MotherDuck Dives Specification - Structured exploration artifacts from unified 57-dataset lake
dives_framework.governance_integration: All dives classified by category, audience, refresh schedule, and governance rules

exploratory_dives.description: Ad-hoc analysis and hypothesis testing (30-day retention, creator access only)

dives.name: quick_borough_comparison
dives.title: Quick Borough Comparison
dives.description: Compare violation closure rates, ramp completion, inspection costs across 5 boroughs

dives.name: outlier_investigation
dives.title: Outlier Investigation
dives.description: Find anomalies in inspection costs, violation closure times, ramp installation delays

dives.name: seasonal_pattern_detection
dives.title: Seasonal Pattern Detection
dives.description: Identify seasonal trends in violations, ramp complaints, construction activity

operational_dives.description: Regular monitoring dashboards (indefinite retention, team access, daily/weekly refresh)

dives.name: daily_inspection_status
dives.title: Daily Inspection Status
dives.description: Inspection completions, violations found, closure rate, by borough and inspector
dives.documentation: Tracks daily inspection completions, violations found, and closure rate. Used for operational monitoring and field supervision.

dives.name: weekly_permit_pipeline
dives.title: Weekly Permit Pipeline
dives.description: Active permits, processing time, approval rates, by permit type and borough
dives.documentation: Tracks active permits in pipeline, approval timelines, and processing efficiency.

dives.name: ramp_program_status
dives.title: Ramp Program Status
dives.description: Installation progress by neighborhood and borough, budget tracking, complaint trends
dives.documentation: Real-time ramp installation progress, budget tracking, and complaint monitoring.

analytical_dives.description: Deep investigation for reporting (indefinite retention, team access, documented methodology)

dives.name: ramp_completion_trend_analysis
dives.title: Ramp Completion Comprehensive Analysis
dives.description: Historical trends, forecasting, bottleneck identification by neighborhood and program type
dives.methodology: Time series decomposition, ARIMA forecasting, KMeans bottleneck clustering
dives.documentation: Detailed analysis of ramp completion rates by borough, neighborhood, and installation type. Includes trend analysis, bottleneck identification, and forecasting.

dives.name: permit_workflow_efficiency
dives.title: Permit Workflow Efficiency Analysis
dives.description: Processing time analysis, variance by permit type, bottleneck detection
dives.methodology: Process mining, variance analysis, bottleneck detection
dives.documentation: Process efficiency analysis identifying approval bottlenecks and variance by permit type.

dives.name: violation_resolution_patterns
dives.title: Violation Resolution Pattern Analysis
dives.description: Closure rate by violation type and borough, SLA compliance, inspector performance
dives.methodology: Funnel analysis, survival curves, SLA compliance tracking
dives.documentation: Detailed closure rate analysis by violation type, borough, and inspector. SLA compliance and bottleneck identification.

strategic_dives.description: Executive briefing and decision support (indefinite retention, exec-only access, sign-off required)

dives.name: strategic_goal_progress
dives.title: Strategic Goal Progress Tracking
dives.description: Multi-dimensional goal tracking across all programs with achievement index
dives.methodology: Composite Metric scoring, goal achievement indexing, risk flagging
dives.documentation: Executive briefing covering strategic goal progress, key metrics, risk areas, and recommendations. Combines data from all major programs.

dives.name: commissioner_briefing
dives.title: Commissioner Strategic Briefing
dives.description: Executive summary: program performance, budget status, SLA compliance, risk areas, recommendations
dives.methodology: Executive scorecard, trend analysis, risk assessment
dives.documentation: Concise executive briefing with strategic context, goal progress, risk areas, and recommended actions.

dives.name: data_health_executive_review
dives.title: Data Health Executive Review
dives.description: Comprehensive data quality, governance compliance, and system health assessment for leadership
dives.methodology: Quality scorecard composite, SLA compliance index, governance audit summary
dives.documentation: Executive-level data health assessment covering data quality metrics, SLA compliance, governance audit results, and system reliability indicators.

dive_governance_rules.rule_1: Every dive must reference source dataset(s) and domain schema
dive_governance_rules.rule_2: Exploratory dives expire after 30 days of inactivity
dive_governance_rules.rule_3: Operational/analytical dives require documented refresh schedule
dive_governance_rules.rule_4: Strategic dives require executive sign-off before publication
dive_governance_rules.rule_5: All dives track lineage back to raw datasets
dive_governance_rules.rule_6: Calculated fields in dives must show derivation formula
dive_governance_rules.rule_7: Sensitive data dives automatically redact PII per sensitivity level
dive_governance_rules.rule_8: Version history maintained for all operational+ dives
dive_governance_rules.rule_9: All dives integrated with governance audit logging
dive_governance_rules.rule_10: Dive refresh schedule enforced via APScheduler (if deployed)
